questions.question: Duncan pass is located between which of the following islands? (UPSC Prelims 1982)
questions.explanation: Duncan pass is located between South and little Andaman. Duncan Passage is a strait in the Indian Ocean. It is about 48 km wide. It separates Rutland Island to the north and Little Andaman to the south.

questions.question: Match the following places with the things known for: A. Korba 1. Atomic Power plant B. Raniganj 2. Heavy Electricals C. Kalpakkam 3. Coal Mines D. Hardwar 4. Aluminium 5. Iron and Steel A B C D (UPSC Prelims 1985)
questions.explanation: • Madras Atomic Power Station is located at Kalpakkam about 80 kilometres south of Chennai. It is a comprehensive nuclear power production, fuel reprocessing, and waste treatment facility that includes plutonium fuel fabrication for fast breeder reactors.• The Heavy Electricals Equipment Plant is one of the major manufacturing plants of BHEL in Hardwar.• Korba is a city and an industrial area in Korba District in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh which is famous of aluminium.• Ranigunj coalfields are the major producer of coal in the country.

questions.question: Which of the following cities of India is located at the respective latitude and longitude of 28.38° N and 77.12° E?
questions.explanation: Delhi has the respective latitude and longitude of 28.38° N and 77.12° E.

questions.question: The traditional construction type earthquake-resistant house Bhonga is found in which of the following places in India?
questions.explanation: The traditional construction type earthquake-resistant house Bhonga is found in the Kutch district of Gujarat. It is actually a cylindrical shaped room with conical roof shade.

questions.question: Which among the following matches of Doabs of the Punjab Haryana plains and their location between rivers are correct?1. Bari Doab- Between Beas and Ravi2. Bist Doab- Between Beas and Satluj3. Rechna Doab- Between Ravi and Chenab4. Chaj Doab- Between Chenab and JhelumChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Bari Doab- Between Beas and Ravi. Bist Doab- Between Beas and Satluj. Rechna Doab- Between Ravi and Chenab. Chaj Doab- Between Chenab and Jhelum.

questions.question: Where are Syntaxial Bends in the Himalayan Range found?
questions.explanation: Syntaxial Bend refers to a sharp southward shift in the alignment of the Himalayan Range where major rivers cut through, thus creating a noticeable “knee” in the mountain chain. Both the Eastern and Western sides of the range witness these bends. The most prominent ones can be traced near Nanga Parbat, where the Indus River intricately works its way and near Namcha Barwa, where the Brahmaputra River finds its passage. These bends significantly influence the regional topography and often result in the formation of lower hill ranges like the Purvanchal in the eastern part of the Himalayas.

questions.question: Pir Panjal Pass provides the easiest access between which of the following places?

options.label: B
options.text: Jammu and the valley of Kashmir

answer.label: B
answer.text: Jammu and the valley of Kashmir

questions.explanation: Pir Panjal Pass also known as Peer ki Gali provides the easiest access between Jammu and the valley of Kashmir. It is located at an elevation of 3,490 meters.

questions.question: Which among the following about the Kullu hill station is/ are correct?1. It is located in the state of Himachal Pradesh2. River Beas flows beside Kullu valley3. Its position is between the Pir Panjal, Lower Himalayan and Great Himalayan RangesChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Kullu hill station is located in the state of Himachal Pradesh. River Beas flows beside Kullu valley. Its position is between the Pir Panjal, Lower Himalayan and Great Himalayan Ranges.

questions.question: Which of the following is known as “The Gateway to Ladakh”?
questions.explanation: Drass is a Hill Station located in Jammu & Kashmir. It is often referred to as “The Gateway to Ladakh”. It is the coldest place in India and considered the coldest inhabited place in the world after Siberia.

questions.question: Which among the following about the Bundelkhand Plateau are correct?1. Senile topography found here2. The largest city of Bundelkhand region is Jhansi3. It is a part of the state of Uttar Pradesh and Madhya PradeshChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Bundelkhand Plateau is a part of the state of Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh. Senile topography found here. he largest city of the Bundelkhand region is Jhansi.
